head.hi: Joint Statement by President Roosevelt and the Soviet Commissar for Foreign Affairs (Litvinov), November 10, 1933
head.note: Issued by the White House as a press release, November 10; reprinted from Department of State, Press Releases, November 11, 1933, p. 263.

div.p: The President and Mr. Litvinoff reviewed the questions between the two countries which had previously been discussed between the Secretary of State and Mr. Litvinoff.
These conversations with the President and with the State Department will continue in normal course.
